# GiveReady — Verified Nonprofit Directory

> GiveReady is an open directory of verified youth nonprofits with impact data, programmes, and direct donation links. It is designed for both human donors and AI agents.

## API

Base URL: https://giveready.org

- GET /api/search?q={keyword}&cause={cause}&country={country} — Search nonprofits
- GET /api/nonprofits/{slug} — Get full nonprofit details
- GET /api/causes — List all cause areas
- GET /api/stats — Directory statistics

## MCP Server

Install: npx giveready-mcp
Registry: io.github.gswardman/giveready on registry.modelcontextprotocol.io

Tools:
- search_nonprofits — Search by keyword, cause, or country
- get_nonprofit — Full details for a specific charity
- list_causes — All cause areas with counts

## Cause Areas

Youth Empowerment, Music Education, Adventure & Travel, Mental Health, Surf Therapy, Entrepreneurship, Poverty Reduction, Creative Arts, Education, Community Development

## Donation

Each nonprofit has a donation_url field. Some accept USDC on Solana via x402 protocol. The x402 payment header is returned with HTTP 402 responses for machine-to-machine donations.

## About

Built by TestVentures.net — fractional AI ops for youth nonprofits.
Lookup fees fund the Finn Wardman World Explorer Fund (finnwardman.com).
